title: SourceClaim
description: A claim extracted from a source about a market event, price movement, or on-chain activity. Represents the atomic unit of signal extraction. Missing/unavailable fields MUST be null.

source_item_id.description: ID of the source UnifiedFeedItem this claim was extracted from.

claim_type.description: Type of claim: fact = verifiable factual statement; derived_data = computed from data; viewpoint = opinion/analysis; prediction = forecast; rumor = unverified/unattributed information.

statement.description: The extracted claim statement in concise text.

confidence.description: Confidence score 0.0–1.0. null if not assessed.

assets.description: List of asset symbols this claim pertains to. Empty array if none.

entities.description: List of named entities (people, organizations, protocols) mentioned. Empty array if none.

extracted_at_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the claim was extracted.

extraction_status.description: Status of extraction: complete = fully extracted; partial = incomplete extraction due to source issues; unavailable = extraction failed.

extraction_note.description: Human-readable note about extraction quality or issues. null if extraction was clean.
